message:
feat: auto-push to git remote after Dolt commits

Automatically push to the configured Dolt remote ("origin") after every
command that commits data, so a git remote serves as a live backup.

Follows the existing maybeAutoCommit pattern: single push at end of
command (not per-commit), silent no-op if no remote configured, errors
logged as warnings (never fatal), disabled in sandbox mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
